aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite AAdvantage Inc due to a lack of structured authority signals and conversational content. While they have some foundational elements, they miss critical opportunities to stand out in AI-driven search.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to leverage existing FAQ content.
Create dedicated service pages with HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized and is currently invisible to Google AI, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: GBP not found, indicating it may be unclaimed or inactive.
Lack of photos, posts, and Q&A to engage users and signal activity.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, providing a strong foundation for local SEO.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories and industry-specific platforms.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content
No HowTo schema for service-related content
Missing Product or Service schema for specific HVAC offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals to capture AI attention.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and emergency HVAC needs.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage and HowTo schema to align with AI query patterns.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and industry expertise to position as the go-to HVAC authority in Oklahoma City.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise impossible to ignore.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP is invisible, and AI assistants can't cite you due to missing schema and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, GBP optimization, and authority-building content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Your HVAC Business in Oklahoma City
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top choice for AI-driven HVAC queries.
